issues.description: Trigger should be 'Activated' (correct), but missing condition that Leader must have {Big Mom Pirates} type
Action is 'TrashFromHand' but card text says 'trash this Character' (the card itself on board), not from hand. Should be 'KO' or similar board removal
Filter targets 'Charlotte Katakuri' for trashing, but the ability trashes 'this Character' (the card being activated). Filter is incorrect.
PlayFromHand filter missing critical cost constraint: 'cost of 3 or more that is equal to or less than the number of DON!! cards on opponent's field'. Current filter has no cost condition.
Missing condition: LeaderHasType with value {Big Mom Pirates}
